Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractClient
    The AbstractClient contains all the methods necessary to set up the client side of a client-server architecture.
    AbstractServer
    The AbstractServer class maintains a thread that waits for connection attempts from clients.
    ActionType
    Represents the different types of actions that can be performed in the restaurant management system.
    AdaptableClient
    The AdaptableClient is a class that extends the AbstractClient in place of the ObservableClient .
    AdaptableServer
    The AdaptableServer is an adapter class that extends the AbstractServer class in place of the AbstractObservableServer .
    AddReservationCommand
    Command implementation for creating a new reservation in the system.
    AddReservationHandler
    Handles server responses for adding a new reservation.
    AddReservationRequest
    Represents a request to add a new reservation in the system.
    AddSpecialDateCommand
    Command implementation for adding a special date (such as a holiday or planned closure) to the restaurant's calendar.
    AddSpecialDateHandler
    Handler for processing the response after adding a special date.
    AddSpecialDateRequest
    Represents a request message to add a new special date to the restaurant system.
    AddToWaitingListCommand
    Command implementation for adding a user to the restaurant's waiting list.
    AddToWaitingListRequest
    Represents a request to add a user or guest to the restaurant waiting list.
    AddUserCommand
    Command implementation for adding a new user to the system.
    AddUserRequest
    Represents a request to add a new user.
    AddWaitingHandler
    ResponseHandler implementation for handling the server response after attempting to add a reservation or waiting list entry.
    AvailableDateTimes
    Represents available reservation times for a specific date.
    AvailableTimesListener
    Listener interface for receiving updates about available times.
    BaseDisplayController
    Abstract base controller for displaying reservations.
    BaseReservationController
    Abstract base controller for reservation management.
    Bill
    Represents a bill for a reservation.
    BillDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Bill entities in the database.
    CancelReservationCommand
    Command implementation for cancelling an existing reservation.
    CancelReservationController
    Controller for displaying and canceling user reservations.
    CancelReservationHandler
    Handles server responses related to reservation cancellations.
    CancelReservationRequest
    Represents a request to cancel a reservation in the restaurant system.
    CancelWaitingCommand
    Command implementation for removing a customer from the restaurant's waiting list.
    CancelWaitingHandler
    Handles server responses related to cancellation of waiting list entries.
    CancelWaitingRequest
    Represents a request to cancel a waiting list entry.
    ClientHandler
    ClientHandler manages communication with the server for all client operations.
    Command
    Interface for the Command design pattern used by the server to process client requests.
    ConnectionToClient
    An instance of this class is created by the server when a client connects.
    CreateOpeningHoursCommand
    Command implementation for creating or updating the restaurant's regular weekly opening hours.
    CreateOpeningHoursHandler
    ResponseHandler implementation for handling the server response when creating a new opening day in the system.
    CreateRegularOpeningHoursRequest
    Represents a request to create regular opening hours for a specific weekday.
    CurrentDinersController
    Controller for displaying the current diners (customers who are seated).
    DailyFunctionController
     
    Day
    Enum representing the days of the week.
    DBController
    DBController is responsible for managing database operations related to reservations, including CRUD operations.
    DeleteOpeningHoursHandler
    Handler for processing the server response after attempting to delete weekly opening hours.
    DeleteOpeningHoursRequest
    Represents a request to delete the opening hours for a specific day in the restaurant's schedule.
    DeleteSpecialDateCommand
    Command implementation for removing a special date (holiday or closure) from the restaurant's calendar.
    DeleteSpecialDateHandler
    Handles the server response for deleting a special date from the restaurant settings.
    DeleteSpecialDateRequest
    Represents a request message to delete an existing special date from the restaurant system.
    DeleteTableCommand
    Command implementation for removing a table from the system.
    DeleteTableHandler
    Handles the server response for deleting a table.
    DeleteTableRequest
    Represents a request message to delete a table from the restaurant system.
    ExitReason
    Represents the reason why a customer left the waiting list
    ForgotCodeCommand
    Command implementation for handling "forgot reservation code" requests.
    ForgotCodeGuestHandler
    Handler for processing the server response when a guest requests their forgotten confirmation code.
    ForgotCodeHandler
    ResponseHandler implementation for handling the server response when a user requests their forgotten reservation confirmation code.
    ForgotCodeRequest
    Represents a request message sent when a user has forgotten their access code.
    GetAllReservationsCommand
    Command implementation for retrieving all reservation records from the system.
    GetAllReservationsHandler
    Handles the server response for retrieving all reservations.
    GetAllReservationsRequest
    Represents a request message to retrieve all reservations from the restaurant system.
    GetAllTablesCommand
    Command implementation for retrieving a complete list of restaurant tables.
    GetAllTablesHandler
    Handler for processing the server response when retrieving all tables.
    GetAllUsersCommand
    Concrete implementation of the Command interface.
    GetAllUsersHandler
    Handles the server response containing a list of all users.
    GetAllUsersRequest
    Represents a request message to retrieve a complete list of all users from the system.
    GetAvailableTimesCommand
    Command implementation for retrieving available time slots for a specific date and party size.
    GetAvailableTimesHandler
    Handles the server response for available reservation times.
    GetAvailableTimesRequest
    Represents a request message to retrieve available time slots for a specific date and party size.
    GetNearestAvailableTimesCommand
    Command implementation for retrieving the nearest available reservation time slots.
    GetNearestAvailableTimesHandler
    Handler for processing the server response that contains the nearest available reservation date and time options.
    GetNearestAvailableTimesRequest
    Represents a request message to find the nearest available reservation times.
    GetReportCommand
    Command implementation for generating restaurant activity reports.
    GetRestaurantSettingsCommand
    Command implementation for retrieving the current restaurant configuration.
    GetRestaurantSettingsHandler
    Handles the server response containing restaurant settings data.
    GetRestaurantSettingsRequest
    Represents a request message to retrieve the current settings of the restaurant.
    GetUserInformationCommand
    Command implementation for retrieving detailed information about a specific user.
    GetUserInformationHandler
    Handles the response for a request that retrieves user information.
    GetUserInformationRequest
    Represents a request message to retrieve detailed information about a specific user.
    GetUserReservationsCommand
    Command implementation for retrieving all reservations associated with a specific customer.
    GetUserReservationsHandler
    Handles responses that contain a list of reservations for a user.
    GetUserReservationsRequest
    Represents a request message to retrieve all reservations associated with a specific customer.
    GetWaitingListBetweenDatesCommand
    Command implementation for retrieving entries from the waiting list within a specific date range.
    GetWaitingListBetweenDatesRequest
    Represents a request message to retrieve the waiting list entries within a specific date range.
    Guest
    Guest class represents a guest at the restaurant
    GuestApp
     
    GuestCancelReservationController
    Controller for allowing a guest to cancel their reservation using a confirmation code.
    GuestMakeReservationController
    Controller for guests to make a reservation without registering as a permanent user.
    GuestReservationController
    Controller for guest reservation operations in the UI.
    GuestUpdateReservationUI
     
    GuestWaitingListController
    Controller for the guest waiting list UI.
    InformationController
    Controller for managing and displaying user information.
    InsertTableCommand
    Command implementation for inserting a new table into the restaurant system.
    InsertTableHandler
    Handles server responses related to inserting a new table into the system.
    InsertTableRequest
    Represents a request message to insert a new table into the restaurant system.
    LoginCommand
    Command implementation for handling user login requests.
    LoginController
    Controller for the login screen.
    LoginHandler
    Handles server responses related to the user login process.
    LoginRequest
    Represents a request message to authenticate a user into the system.
    LogoutCommand
    Command implementation for handling user logout requests.
    LogoutHandler
    Handles the logout process for the client.
    LogoutRequest
    Represents a request message to log out a user from the system.
    MainMenuApp
    Main JavaFX application class for the main menu.
    MainMenuController
    Controller for the main menu UI.
    Manager
    Represents a restaurant manager user.
    ManagerController
    Controller for the Manager UI.
    MarkNotifiedCommand
    Command implementation for updating the notification status of a reservation.
    MarkNotifiedHandler
    Handles the server response for marking a reservation as notified.
    Message
    Represents a message sent between the client and server.
    MonthYearSelectorController
    Controller for selecting a month and year for generating reports.
    ObservableClient
    This class acts as a subclass of AbstractClient and is also an Observable class.
    ObservableOriginatorServer
    The ObservableOriginatorServer is a subclass of ObservableServer that sends OriginatorMessage instances to its observers.
    ObservableServer
    This class acts as a subclass of AbstractServer and is also an Observable class.
    OpeningHours
    Abstract base class representing the opening and closing hours of the restaurant.
    OrderController
    Controller for displaying the order history of a user.
    OriginatorMessage
    A message class used by the Observable layer of the OCSF in order to conserve information about the originator of a message.
    PayCommand
    Command implementation for processing payments and finalizing reservations.
    PaymentController
    Controller for handling payments in the UI.
    PaymentController
    Controller class responsible for handling the payment process within the restaurant.
    PaymentHandler
    Handles server responses related to payment processing.
    PaymentRequest
    Represents a request message to process a payment and finalize a reservation.
    PaymentResult
    A utility class used to encapsulate the result of a payment processing operation.
    RegisterationController
    Controller for the Registration UI.
    RegisterCommand
    Command implementation for registering new users in the system.
    RegisterHandler
    Handles server responses related to user registration.
    RegisterRequest
    Represents a registration request message sent within the system.
    RemoveOpeningHoursCommand
    Command implementation for removing a set of weekly opening hours from the system.
    Report
    Represents a report generated by the system.
    ReportController
    Abstract base controller for generating and displaying reports.
    ReportDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Report entities in the database.
    ReportHandler
    Handles server responses related to reports and updates JavaFX charts in the ReportController with the received data.
    ReportRequest
    Represents a request message to generate a specific management report.
    ReportSession
    Holds the current session information for generating reports.
    ReportType
    Represents the type of report that can be generated.
    Reservation
    Represents a reservation in the restaurant.
    ReservationAffectedHandler
     
    ReservationController
    Controller class responsible for handling the logic of restaurant reservations.
    ReservationControllerTest
     
    ReservationDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing restaurant reservations.
    ReservationsController
    Controller for displaying all reservations in a table view.
    ReservationStatus
    Represents the status of a reservation in the restaurant system.
    ResponseHandler
    Represents a handler for processing server responses.
    RestaurantSettings
    Represents the configuration and settings of the restaurant, including maximum tables, weekly opening hours, special dates, and reservation duration.
    RestaurantSettingsController
    Controller for managing restaurant settings in the UI.
    RestaurantSettingsController
    Controller class responsible for managing restaurant settings, including opening hours, special dates, and table capacity.
    RestaurantSettingsDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing general restaurant configurations.
    RestaurantSettingsDays
    Enum representing the days of the week specifically for restaurant settings.
    SceneManager
    Utility class for managing scene navigation in the application.
    SeatCustomerCommand
    Command implementation for seating a customer when they arrive at the restaurant.
    SeatCustomerHandler
    Handles server responses related to seating a customer.
    SeatCustomerRequest
    Represents a request message to seat a customer at a table.
    ServerApp
    The main entry point for the Server application.
    ServerController
    Main server controller that extends the AbstractServer.
    ServerResponse
    Represents a standard response from the server.
    ServerUIController
    Controller class for the Server's Graphical User Interface.
    SpecialDates
    Represents a special date for the restaurant with different opening and closing hours.
    SpecialDatesDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing SpecialDates in the restaurant.
    Subscriber
    Represents a subscriber user in the restaurant system.
    SubscriberController
    Controller for the Subscriber UI.
    SubscriberInformationController
    Controller for displaying information about subscribers.
    SubscriberReservationController
    Controller for handling subscriber reservations.
    SubscribersHistortOrdersController
    Controller for displaying the historical orders of subscribers.
    SubscribersReportController
    Controller for generating and displaying subscriber reports in the UI.
    SubscriberWaitingListController
    Controller for managing a subscriber's waiting list.
    SubscribesReportController
    Controller to generate weekly subscribers reports.
    Supervisor
    Represents a restaurant supervisor user in the system.
    SupervisorController
    Controller for the Supervisor main interface.
    Table
    Represents a table in the restaurant.
    TableController
    Controller responsible for physical table management within the restaurant.
    TableDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Table entities and their persistence logic.
    TableReceivingGuestController
    Controller for the "Table Receiving" UI for guests.
    TableReceivingSubscriberController
    Controller for the Table Receiving UI for subscribers.
    TablesController
    Controller for managing restaurant tables.
    TableSettingsController
    Controller responsible for the administrative configuration of restaurant tables.
    TimeData
    Represents time-related data for a reservation.
    TimeReportController
    Controller responsible for generating statistical reports regarding time management.
    TimesReportController
    Controller for generating and displaying the times (schedule) report.
    UpdateClosingTimeCommand
    Command implementation for updating the standard closing time for a specific day of the week.
    UpdateOpeningTimeCommand
    Command implementation for updating the standard opening time for a specific day of the week.
    UpdateRegularClosingTimeHandler
    Handles server responses related to updating the restaurant's regular closing time.
    updateRegularClosingTimeRequest
    Represents a request message to update the standard closing time for a specific day of the week.
    UpdateRegularOpeningTimeHandler
    Handles server responses for updating the regular opening times of the restaurant.
    updateRegularOpeningTimeRequest
    Represents a request message to update the standard opening time for a specific day of the week.
    UpdateReservationCommand
    Command implementation for updating an existing reservation's details.
    UpdateReservationHandler
    Handles server responses for update reservation requests.
    UpdateReservationRequest
    Represents a request to update an existing reservation in the system.
    UpdateSpecialDateCommand
    Command implementation for updating an existing special date entry in the restaurant's calendar.
    UpdateSpecialDateHandler
    Handles server responses related to updating special dates in the restaurant settings.
    UpdateSpecialDateRequest
    Represents a request message to update the details of an existing special date in the system.
    UpdateTableCommand
    Command implementation for updating an existing table's configuration.
    UpdateTableHandler
    Handles server responses related to updating table information.
    UpdateTableRequest
    Represents a request message to update the details of an existing table in the restaurant.
    UpdateUserCommand
    Command implementation for updating user information in the system.
    UpdateUserHandler
    Handles server responses for user profile updates.
    UpdateUserRequest
    Represents a request message to update an existing user's information in the system.
    User
    Abstract base class representing a user in the restaurant system.
    UserController
    Server-side logic controller for users.
    UserDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing all user types in the system, including Subscriber, Guest, Manager, and Supervisor.
    UserFactory
    UserFactory Class uses factory design pattern in order to create users
    UserRole
    Represents the different roles a user can have in the system
    WaitingList
    Represents a waiting list for a single day in the restaurant.
    WaitingListController
    Controller for the Waiting List UI.
    WaitingListController
    Controller responsible for managing the restaurant's waiting list and real-time reservation logic.
    WaitingListDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing the restaurant's waiting list.
    WaitingListEntry
    Represents an entry in the restaurant waiting list.
    WaitingStatus
    Represents the status of a customer in the waiting list.
    WeekData
    Represents weekly data for the restaurant.
    WeeklyOpeningHours
    Represents the opening and closing hours for a specific weekday.
    WeeklyWaitingListHandler
    Handles server responses containing weekly waiting list entries.
